ohtani.title: Yamamoto's dominance, nine-run 1st fuel Dodgers' win
ohtani.blurb: Yoshinobu Yamamoto tosses eight strong innings and the Dodgers score nine runs in the 1st in a 9-2 win over the Angels

imanaga.title: Craig Counsell recaps Cubs' comeback victory
imanaga.blurb: Craig Counsell talks about Shota Imanaga's start, the inside-the-park home run, and the Cubs' 9th inning comeback to win the game

suzuki.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong homers twice in Cubs win!
suzuki.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong's two home runs and Michael Busch's walk-off single lift the Cubs to a 3-2 win over the Giants in extra innings

yoshida.title: Five-run inning lifts Red Sox to win
yoshida.blurb: Boston's five-run inning, powered by Wilyer Abreu's two-run homer, lifts the Red Sox to a 8-1 win over the Orioles

okamoto.title: Clement's three RBIs and clutch defense fuel 6-4 win
okamoto.blurb: Ernie Clement's three-run home run and clutch defense help to lift the Blue Jays to a 6-4 win over the Orioles

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Luis Torrens, Christian Scott lead Mets to 5-0 win
matsui.blurb: Luis Torrens crushes a double and a two-run home run and Christian Scott pitches a scoreless start in the Mets' 5-0 win over the Padres
